Added get_post_meta calls for _EventCost and _EventCurrencySymbol; built $cost_display string; added Cost Line paragraph in Lower Group after venue, before external link button

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP both read cost/currency meta fields and render them with identical classes. htmlStructureSync warning about InspectorControls vs section is a known false positive for blocks using Fragment wrappers.
